betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Bio-Programming: Nanomachines§f

§aInject micro-robotic swarms into your bloodstream to gain custom potion buffs and automated protection!§f
§bNanomachines§f are internal augmentations that can be programmed to grant you active status effects.

§6Nanomachine Controller & Power§f:
§b• Energy Storage§f: The internal nanomachine controller stores up to §e100,000 energy§f.
§b• Passive Power Drain§f: Each active input node consumes §e0.5 energy per tick§f.
§b• Reconfiguration Cost§f: Reorganizing your nanomachine network structure consumes §e5,000 energy§f.

§6Network Inputs & Toxicity§f:
Nanomachines operate via a trigger-response neural network. Activating too many triggers simultaneously is toxic:
§b• Safe Active Inputs§f: You can have up to §e2 active inputs§f safely.
§b• Attuned Limit§f: The hard limit of active inputs is §e4§f.
§b• Toxicity Debuffs§f: Going above §e2 active inputs§f will apply negative status effects to you.

§6Potion Whitelist§f:
The controller can trigger the following integrated potion effects:
§a• Positive§f: §eSpeed§f, §eHaste§f, §eStrength§f, §eJump Boost§f, §eResistance§f, §eFire Resistance§f, §eWater Breathing§f, §eNight Vision§f, and §eAbsorption§f.
§c• Negative§f: §eBlindness§f, §eNausea§f, §eMining Fatigue§f, §eInstant Damage§f, §eHunger§f, §eSlowness§f, §ePoison§f, §eWeakness§f, and §eWither§f.

§cEmergency Loop: Hungry Behavior§f:
If your Nanomachine Controller runs completely out of energy, it will trigger its starvation safeguard:
§c• Damage§f: Deals §c5 damage (2.5 hearts)§f directly to the player.
§a• Recharge§f: Restores §e50 energy units§f to the controller per tick of damage.
Keep the controller charged to prevent it from consuming your health!
